title: Executive/Senior Executive, Data & AI (AI Developer)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Work with business analysts and internal stakeholders to identify business problems and opportunities propose analytics solutions, as well as data and technology requirements, and formalize them into a project Analytics solutions which include, but are not limited to report automation, advanced analytics, and AI engines
  • Work with data engineers to plan, identify,and integrate data from multiple source systems to enterprise data platform for analytics purposes
  • Perform data exploration, preprocess, and analyse the data (both structured and unstructured); develop and deploy machine learning/deep learning models
  • Create dashboards to communicate and present key findings to stakeholders, and manage UAT
  • Work with the team to run and prioritise projects according to objectives and business impact
  • Design and build Generative AI applications like GPT-enabled chatbots to innovate and drive impactful solutions in the company
  • Explore new methodologies for increasing the efficiency and effectiveness of Generative AI applications
  • Continuously evaluate and enhance the performance of Generative AI models through rigorous testing andexperimentation

Requirements

  • Bachelor's or master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Computer Engineering or equivalent disciplines that focused on extensive use of data for analysis
  • Strong programming experience using python or spark, with solid understanding of data science concepts.
  • Practical knowledge in statistical and machine learning techniques including Regression, Random Forest, Boosting, Trees, Text Mining, Network Analysis, etc
  • Practical knowledge in deep learning techniques including computer version, NLP, etc
  • Experience in data visualization software such as Power BI or Tableau
  • Good collaboration and communication skills to work effectively across teams and partner with business stakeholders
  • Beneficial to possess knowledge or practicalexperience in generative AI or developing LLM applications using the Microsoft Azure stack or third-party packages such as LangChain.

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
